'''Lis'an''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Antiquity]]. It was a quiet spaceport town on the edge of the [[South Mudflats]]. It mainly consisted of [[plasticrete]] structures. It had one tavern that smelled like garbage.<ref name="FT" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Free Time|book=The Politics of Contraband|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
